questions.question: Describe the primary objective of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in terms of its relationship to human intelligence. (5 marks)
questions.hint: What is the main goal of AI?

questions.question: Explain the concept of a 'problem space' in the context of Artificial Intelligence. How does it relate to the problems that AI aims to solve? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the key components of a problem space and its relevance to AI

questions.question: State the main difference between a 'search' and a 'problem-solving' approach in Artificial Intelligence. Provide an example of each. (8 marks)
questions.hint: Make sure to clearly distinguish between the two approaches and provide suitable examples
